auth.enter_credentials: Faʻaisiga lou imeli ma le upu faʻalilo
auth.create_sub: Soʻo atu i tausaga o Kiwis e faitau moni o India.
auth.already_have_account: O loʻo loʻo i ai lou aoga?
auth.forgot_sub: Faʻaisiga lou imeli ma matou te aʻafia ai se laki toe tautai.
auth.back_to_signin: Toe taʻu i le saʻili i totonu
auth.welcome_continue_signin: O loʻo saʻili nei i matou?

Moni o India,
faafeauuina i ou faitotonu.
auth.welcome_hero_subtitle: Faitau India, i le auala e faitau ai Initia — e aunoa ma le malaga.
auth.welcome_usp_sellers: Tuʻuina mai e le tagata faʻatau Indian
two_factor.title: Saʻili i totonu e lua mea
two_factor.subtitle: Matou te aʻafia ai se koʻi 6-numera i %{email}. Faʻaisiga i lalo e soʻo ai.
two_factor.enter_six_digits: Faʻaisiga le koʻi 6-numera mai lou imeli
two_factor.session_expired: Taimi na moe — saʻili i totonu toe
two_factor.could_not_resend: E le mafai ona aʻafia toe le koʻi
two_factor.settings_title: Faʻamaoni i totonu e lua mea
two_factor.status_on: Faʻamaoni i totonu e lua mea o ON
two_factor.status_off: Faʻamaoni i totonu e lua mea o OFF
two_factor.status_on_body: A saʻili i totonu, matou te aʻafia ai se koʻi 6-numera i %{email}.
two_factor.status_off_body: Faʻaopoopoina le salamo i le manao o se koʻi mai lou imeli i le saʻili i totonu.
two_factor.code_prompt: Tusi le 6-digit code na matou fesiligia atu i lou imeli:
two_factor.turn_off_msg: O lou akauti e le mautonu. O le a matou fesiligia atu se code e faʻamaonia ai o oe.
two_factor.enabled_alert_body: Mai iinei, e manaʻomia e oe se code imeli e tutū ai.
two_factor.disabled_alert_body: O lou akauti e le aʻoaʻo se code imeli i le tutū.
two_factor.help_text: Faʻapefea e galue: ina ua e tusi lou passwords, o le a matou fesiligia atu se 6-digit code i lou imeli. O na codes e pau ina 10 minute ma e 5 taumafai lamoa i le code.
two_factor.could_not_send: Na le mafai ona fesiligia atu le code
two_factor.could_not_verify: Na le mafai ona faʻamaonia le code
two_factor.please_sign_in: Talofa, tutū e taʻitasi e taʻitaia 2FA.
two_factor.menu_sub: Code imeli i le tutū mo le faasusuega faʻaopoopo
home.no_match: E leai ni oloa e fetaui ma lou sailia
home.no_match_body: Taumafai se isi sieve, faʻamalaulau ou vaega, poʻo toe foa mai talofa — o mea fou e taunuʻu aiga faʻataʻi.
orders_screen.title: Oʻu faʻataunuʻu
orders_screen.empty_body: Faia lou muamua faʻataunuʻu mai sellers i India ma o le a tuʻu iinei. Tracking, refunds, ma re-ordering e ola i le tasi le nofoaga.

wishlist.signin_required: Tutū e vaʻai i lou wishlist
wishlist.signin_sub: Taʻu mea e te alofa ai ma tu ai i soo se taimi mai soʻo se masini.
wishlist.empty_sub: Paki le fatu i soʻo se oloa e save ai mo le taʻitai. O le a matou taʻu oe i le paʻu faʻaviʻi.

empty_state.find_anything_sub: Taumafai "kurta", "spices", "handicrafts"… poʻo suʻe se vaega i lalo.

seller_referrals.hero_sub: Maua 5 % o le paiga o le pailota i luga o lo latou muamua NZ$10,000 o GMV — e oo atu i NZ$500 mo taitasi fa'aulufale i le 12 masina.

seller_referrals.how2: Latou te saini i luga e pei o se tagata faatau fa'aaoga lau code.
seller_referrals.how3: Afai latou ua fa'amaonia ma fai o latou muamua tai, e maua oe 5 % o le paiga o le pailota i luga o a latou muamua NZ$10,000 GMV.
seller_referrals.how4: O le paiga ua tatalaina i le 'avaloaloa i lau payouts wallet (fa'aeleele i NZ$500 mo taitasi fa'aulufale, 12-masina le ava).

seller_documents.choose_photo: Filifiliga le fata mai le fata-ata
seller_documents.permission_needed_body: Taua le faatagaga i ou fata e tuuina atu ai ou pepa.
seller_documents.both_required_body: Fa'aopoopo le fata matai ma le faamaoniga o le pisinisi e faagaoi.
seller_documents.policy_required: Polisi o le Maafu e taua
seller_documents.policy_required_body: Fa'alavelave le Polisi o le Maafu, Polisi o le Fa'ataofiina o Tupe, ma Polisi o le Foei e tuuina atu.
seller_documents.submitted_body: O le polokalame e iloiloga. E tali i loʻo totonu o 7 aso galulue.
admin_commission.title: Suʻesuʻega Komisina
admin_commission.no_paid_orders: Leai ni polokalame ua taliaina i lenei vaiaso
admin_commission.footnote: O fua faʻa pau i le fa'afoʻi o le faʻailoga o loʻo ola i polokalame uma ua taliaina i le vaiaso. Foʻi le `services/stripe_connect_svc.py` e fa'atali'i ai fua o vaega.
seller_stripe.get_paid_body: Seti ia lou akauniti taliaina ina ia mafai ai ma'u ona tuʻuina atu lou tupe maua ina ua uma le aso 14 o le faʻafoʻiga i polokalame.
seller_stripe.active_body: O au taliaina o loʻo fa'atino. O matou a le fesuiaʻi lou vaega o fakaaogaina i le polokalame i lou penā i le fa'aaoga perofesionale.
seller_stripe.finish_body_more_details: E manaʻo Stripe i nisi fa'amatalaga ae le mafai ona fa'atino le taliaina.
seller_stripe.finish_body_didnt_finish: Na e amata le faia ae na e leʻi fa'atumaloʻi — tusi i lalo e fa'apatinoa.
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_load: Na le mafai ona uta le faʻailoga o Stripe
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_start: Na le mafai ona amata le Stripe onboarding
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_open: Na le mafai ona bukabukai le Stripe dashboard
seller_stripe.info_payouts_title: E faʻapefea ona galue le taliaina
seller_stripe.info_payouts_body: Ina ua uma le polokalame, o matou a le pule i le tupe a le tagata faʻatau i le aso 14 (le vaiaso o faʻafoʻiga). Ina ua uma le vaiaso leai ni faʻafoʻiga, o matou a le tuʻuina atu lou tupe maua — i le fa'aaoga perofesionale — i lou penā na fesoʻotaʻi ai Stripe i le Aso Toonai.
seller_stripe.info_fees_body: O le komisiina a le Allsale o le tele 12% o le tau o meaʻai (e le aunoa le aofaʻi o le feliuaʻi). O le tau felagolagoina o Stripe o loo taui e Allsale — e leʻi toia ai i lou taliaina.
seller_bulk_edit.title: Fa'abigā le liʻolioʻi
seller_bulk_edit.action_set_price_hint: O le tau o NZD e tutusa mo ia uma
seller_bulk_edit.action_set_stock_hint: O le aofa'i tutusa o le toʻatasi mo ia uma
seller_bulk_edit.action_toggle_avail_hin: Fuaʻo i faʻa/ese o le toʻatasi
seller_bulk_edit.action_delete_hint: Lūmia i le taimi pea (e leʻi mafai ona toe foʻi)
seller_bulk_edit.ph_pct: faʻataʻitaʻiga -10 mo le 10% e ese, 15 mo le +15%
seller_bulk_edit.ph_stock: O le aofa'i fou o le toʻatasi
seller_bulk_edit.delete_warn: O lenei mea a lūmia ai le liʻolioʻi na filifilia.
seller_bulk_edit.empty: Leai ni liʻolioʻi e lei lua.
seller_bulk_edit.err_select_one: Filifili i le itiiti iasi le liʻolioʻi
seller_bulk_edit.err_price: Tuʻu se tau o lona aʻo maʻaloʻaloʻi > 0
seller_bulk_edit.err_pct_too_neg: O le pasene a le lūmia/fa'amalooʻi le tau
seller_bulk_edit.err_stock_delta: Tuʻu se toʻatasi fa'abigā faʻapea -5 poʻo +10
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_one: Alu lava le 1 fa'asoa? E le mafai ona toe fai.
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_other: Alu lava {{count}} fa'asoa? E le mafai ona toe fai.
seller_support_index.title: Tusi fesoasoani
seller_support_index.no_tickets: Leai se tusi i le taimi nei
seller_support_index.no_tickets_body: E te manaomia se fesoasoani i le tupe, faomiga, KYC po o se isi mea? Tusi se tusi ma o le au fesoasoani o le Allsale e tali atu.
admin_ambassadors_index.title: Sualaumeaiga
admin_ambassadors_index.empty: Leai se sualaumeaiga e tutasi i au siilaiga.
seller_support_new.title: Tusi se tusi
seller_support_new.help_text: Matou te tali i {{time}} mo {{priority}} tulaga tusi.
seller_support_new.subject_placeholder: Faamatala lavelave i laina e tasi
seller_support_new.describe_placeholder: Fa'atonu e faatino, faomiga/payout ID, i mea na fuafuaina versus mea moni…
seller_support_new.warning_text: Aua ne'i fa'asoa le metotia, numera fa'aletipani, po o fa'aaliga fa'apitoa o le oloa.
seller_support_new.pri_medium_desc: E aafia se vaega o lo'u toa
seller_support_new.pri_high_desc: E tulitulilafai i lo'u galuega i le aso
seller_support_new.limit_reached_body: E te mafai ona fa'apia e la'u 4 ata.
seller_support_new.permission_needed_bod: E manaomia e matou le fa'aatua i au ata e fa'apia ai ata.
seller_support_new.need_more_detail_body: Faailoa le faamatala i le itiiti ifo 10 faataitaitaiga.
seller_support_new.couldnt_raise: Na le mafaia ona faalalagaina le tiketi

seller_support_detail.couldnt_submit_rat: Na le mafaia ona tuʻu le faʻataʻiga
seller_support_detail.close_msg: E leai se mea e fasia toe faʻagaoioi.
seller_support_detail.rate_modal_title: Se faʻapefea ona faia e i matou?
seller_support_detail.rate_prompt_body: Pusi e tuʻu se fetu 1–5 mo lenei tiketi.
seller_support_detail.rate_modal_body: O oe faʻataʻiga ua oa atu i le tamilioʻi o le faalapeotaneʻi. Pusi i fetu i lalo.
seller_financing.title: Tupe faʻatautia
seller_financing.hero_title: Maua le faʻatautia i luga o au faamatalaga
seller_financing.hero_body: Aua le faatitipono T+5/10 aso mo au totogi. O āmatou NBFC aia fai le faʻatautia 70–90% o faufautasi ua faʻamalamaʻia i le 24h. E te totogi 1–2% e, ia latou faatitipono, e te faigaʻai atili.
seller_financing.eligible_title: E tutusa — o oe o le {{tier}}
seller_financing.not_eligible_title: E le tutusa foi — o oe {{tier}} i le taimi nei
seller_financing.apply_sub: O le a matou lafoai au faifaaʻiga i le au faapale. E te a'afia mai ia te oe i loʻo {{hours}}h e fai ai o latou KYC.
seller_financing.placeholder_notes: Se mea e tatau i le faapale ona iloa…
seller_financing.not_eligible_toast: E le atoatoa le toe fai
seller_financing.not_eligible_fallback: Mamao i le Verified tier muamua.
seller_financing.interest_noted_body: O {{name}} e fesoʻotaʻi mai ia te oe i loʻo {{hours}}h. Ua matou faʻailoa atu foʻi i le lagolago Allsale.
admin_team.title: Au faapale
admin_team.owner_access_required: Toe avanoa o le master e manaʻomia
admin_team.intro_body: Okena i au faapale ma faʻapitoa o latou toe avanoa i le faiga. O sub-admins e sailia i le email + faʻailo i le admin screen.
admin_team.confirm_remove_msg: E mautinoa le ʻauʻauina o le admin account.
admin_team.initial_password_label: Faʻailo muamua — kopi IINEI (faaʻilo se tasi lava)
admin_team.share_password_body: Faʻasiasia le faʻailo i le admin fou i luga o le avanoa saʻo. E tatau ona suia e ia i le sailia muamua.
admin_team.new_password_label: Faʻailo fou — kopi IINEI (faaʻilo se tasi lava)
admin_team.share_reset_body: Faʻasiasia i le avanoa saʻo. E tatau ona suia e le admin i le sailia i ai.
seller_upgrade.title: Fai se faipale
seller_upgrade.intro: Ua e sailia ona. Faʻaopoopoina o au faifaaʻiga faigatonu i lalo ae matou te faʻamaonia o lou kamupani i luga o le fomu o le govʻamene India.
seller_upgrade.referral_title: Ua fesoʻotaʻi mai i se Ampiseta?
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_a: Faʻaopoopoina o latou code i lalo e maua ai
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_b: — ae o latou e maua ai se tagofa a'e sa'o i le saili muamua 5 fa'atau o au faigatonu.
seller_upgrade.referral_hint: E le o manaʻomia — tuua e aʻo pe a le o ia te oe se code.
seller_upgrade.error_default: Na le mafaia le fousili o le account
seller_welcome.title:
Foʻi au oloa
I NZ kaiga.
seller_welcome.subtitle: Allsale e fesoʻotaʻi ai le Initia-faʻatusiʻia nisi galuega faʻatasi ma kaiga faʻatau i Niu Suilani. Faʻamaonia ma amata faʻatau i le itiiti iata.
seller_welcome.req1_title: O se galuega faʻatusiʻia i Initia
seller_welcome.req1_body: O le tagata faʻatasi gana e le aoga — o lenei faʻataʻitaʻiga mo nisi nai galuega naʻo iʻo lava.
seller_welcome.req2_title: GSTIN, PAN (ma se mea laʻai CIN)
seller_welcome.req2_body: Matou faʻamaonia lava au galuega i faʻamatalaga o le Initia malo.
seller_welcome.req3_title: O se tuʻuʻiga faʻatusiʻia i Initia
seller_welcome.req3_body: Faʻaogaina mo toʻilaloina mo kaiga faʻaprotesia.
seller_welcome.policy_title: O le tasi faʻataʻitaʻiga, lua kamupaniga
seller_welcome.policy_text: Kaiga faʻatau mai Niu Suilani (allsale.co.nz). Faʻatau e tatau ona iai se galuega i Initia. Matou e le mafai le tagata toʻatasi pe le kaiga e le o Initia i lenei taimi.
seller_welcome.already_have_account: Ua ia te oe se konta Allsale?
seller_pro.title: Allsale Pro
seller_pro.hero_body: Allsale Pro e faʻaʻeleʻele au fua mai le 12% i le 9% ma faʻalulu ai nā meafaʻaausa e faʻaaogaina e le kaiga aʻoaʻo ina ia faʻatupulaia.
seller_pro.price_sub: Tuʻu i soʻu manao. E leai se faʻatulagaina fua.
seller_pro.active_title: O oe i luga o Allsale Pro
seller_pro.will_cancel_body: Tuʻuina i le gataifale o au taimi agavale.
seller_pro.section_benefits: O le mea e te maua
seller_pro.benefit1_body: Taofia le 25% i fagaʻi faʻatau. E totogi mo ia lava i ₹17k masina GMV.
seller_pro.benefit2_body: Goloi fetu i fagaʻi faʻalaʻau — faʻapitoa e faʻalulu le liliu 5–15%.
seller_pro.benefit3_body: Pro faʻatau e ofo aʻo sili i masani & saʻo toʻiga.
seller_pro.benefit4_title: 4 e leai se faʻalaʻau faʻalaʻau / masina
seller_pro.benefit4_body: E aoga ₹1,000/mo i ona lava — tuʻu au aʻo sili SKU i le malamalama.
seller_pro.benefit5_body: O le ala e tasi faleaiga. Feeseeseʻai faʻafoʻi o le vave, tupe faʻalailoa o le vave.
seller_pro.benefit6_body: Liliu i SKU, talaiga faʻatau, faʻalaʻau-kaai naʻo le aʻoaʻo.
seller_pro.not_enabled_msg: O la matou aʻoaʻo e faʻafoʻi ai le tapeʻa. Toe saʻili i le vave.
seller_pro.confirm_cancel_msg: O au faʻalaʻau e tumau ina ua i le gataifale o au taimi patupatu. Ina ua maeʻa lea e toe i le masani 12% fua.
seller_pro.cancel_scheduled_msg: Pro e tumau seia i le gataifale o paʻu.
seller_sponsored.title: Faʻalaʻau e taʻulaʻu
seller_sponsored.hero_title: Faʻapupuʻu le mea e te fia faʻatau
seller_sponsored.hero_sub: Totogi-i-per-piki. Faʻaaoga au pusa, tuʻu se faʻaiʻu paʻu, tuʻu soʻu manao.
seller_sponsored.empty_body: Faʻapupuʻu se faʻalaʻau i le aiga, masani ma saʻo polupega. O oe e tuʻu ai le faʻaiʻu paʻu ma totogi naʻo le kaiga e piki.
seller_sponsored.delete_msg: O lenei e tuʻu ai le faʻapupuʻu mo {{name}}. O mea e tautala ai e taofia mo se paʻu.
seller_sponsored.hint_estimate: Mafai ona aafia: {{clicks}} kiliki/aso. O matou a le aafia fua pe a uma le pulatasi i le aso ma toe aami i le aso taeao.
seller_sponsored.couldnt_create: Na le mafai ona gao le fa'alauina
seller_sponsored.wallet_meta: Tuu le ${{topup}} · paʻu le ${{spent}} i le olaga
seller_sponsored.min_topup: Le itiiti o le tuu atu e $5 NZD
seller_sponsored.opening_stripe_body: O le au tali o le seini e a i le ala a le taua.
seller_sponsored.topup_failed: Na le mafai ona tuu le tali
seller_sponsored.topup_btn: Tuu le tali e ala i Stripe
seller_profile.title: Filiga o le faleoloa
seller_profile.could_not_load: Na le mafai ona auina le togilau
seller_profile.permission_needed_msg: E manaomia e i matou le faatagaga i au ata e aani ai au ata o le faleoloa.
seller_profile.saved_msg: O au filiga o le faleoloa ua faafoago.
seller_profile.check_input_msg: Tusi le au faaliliuga o le taimi nei ma se faaliliuga foou ≥ 8 upu faatasi ai se numera.
seller_profile.password_updated_msg: O isi masini uma e ua fa'asolo mai.
seller_profile.could_not_change_password: Na le mafai ona suia le faaliliuga
seller_profile.signout_confirm_title: Fa'asolo mai i isi masini uma?
seller_profile.signout_confirm_msg: E te momoli i iinei. O isi masini uma e tatau ona fa'asolo mai i le toe aami.
seller_profile.signout_destructive: Fa'asolo mai i nisi o faleoloa
seller_profile.signout_done_body: O isi taunuusega uma ua gaosia.
seller_profile.banner_hint: Kiliki e aani ai le ata o le faleoloa (16:9)
seller_profile.field_store_name: Igoa o le faleoloa e vaavaai ai
seller_profile.bio_placeholder: Kolone Inia faʻaonogaina — gao e lima i Jaipur
seller_profile.address_warn: E faʻapoloaʻi le faʻasuʻega o le tuatusi o le faʻaiʻu o le admin KYC (7-aso SLA).
seller_profile.payout_help: E vaavaaia le faamatalaga o le paniko e le admin mo le fa'atonuga o le taui. O le avanoa moni e fa'aoga ai Stripe — e na o le 4 numera mulimuli o le au akaunita e tilapia.
seller_profile.field_account_holder: Igoa o le faʻapitoa o le akaunita
seller_profile.pause_sub: E faatagaina tatau ai i le isi o au lisi mai le malaga o iga.
seller_profile.away_label: Filifilia o te i alala (vaavaai ai i le fesoasoani ole pese)
seller_profile.away_placeholder: Toe sau i le 20 Iulai — o le tali o le maualofa e mae'a ai i lela taimi.
seller_profile.shipping_help: Fa'aoga ai i le ETA o le faʻatauva. Po le mafai ona fasi & aaunuʻu i le aso e mulimuli ai le taui o le feau.
seller_profile.field_current_password: Upu salafia o le taimi nei
seller_referrals_game.title: Gantala o fa'amatalaga
seller_referrals_game.couldnt_share: Le mafai ona tatala le pepa fa'asoa
seller_referrals_game.share_message: Aloalogia a'u lava i le polokalame Allsale — e mafai e polokalame Inia ona tupe 15% tapunia tonotono. Sumali i lo'u laisini: {{url}}
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_title: Ia mua i le lisi o nei ua manumalo
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_body: Omia se polokalame fa'amaonia lenei {{period}} e osia i le #1.
seller_referrals_game.footer_hint: Matou te faamaonia se fa'amatalaga a uma latou ala i le fa'amaoniga o le pisinisi. E tupe ai oe 15% o taliga o le palapala i o latou muamua 12 masina o polokalame.
seller_referrals_game.max_tier: Maualuga o le faasologa na ausia 🎉
seller_new_listing.title: Fa'asalalauga fou
seller_new_listing.photos_hint: O le muamua ata o le ufi. Faaopoopo i {{max}} ata.
seller_new_listing.photo_limit_msg: E mafai ona faaopoopo {{max}} ata i le fa'asalalauga.
seller_new_listing.photos_perm_msg: Tatala Faitau e tuʻu atu filifiliga ata ina ia mafai ai ona tu'u atu ata o oloa.
seller_new_listing.upload_warning_msg: Le mafai le tu'u atu; faʻaaogaina le kopiga o le nofoaga.
seller_new_listing.stock_oos_hint: O le 0 stoca o lona uiga e iloa ai e tagata faʻatau o lenei o "Out of stock".
seller_new_listing.size_placeholder: faʻataʻitaʻiga. S, M, L, XL poʻo Free Size
seller_new_listing.sizes_hint: Faʻaliliilisao. Tuʻu matuʻu mo oloa o le tasi tele.
seller_new_listing.description_placehold: Faʻaamio i tagata faʻatau e uiga i mea, fua, o le mea e lauiloa ai.
seller_new_listing.err_name_desc: Igoa ma fa'amatalaga (10+ upu) e manaʻomia
seller_new_listing.err_price: Tuʻu se tau saʻo i le NZD
seller_new_listing.err_photos: Faʻaopoopo faʻatonu se ata o le oloa.
seller_new_listing.err_default: Le mafai ona faia le fa'asalalauga
seller_import.title: Agaʻi i luma fa'asalalauga
seller_import.step0_h1: O fea le fa'asalalauga o oe e afua mai?
seller_import.step0_sub: Aumaia lau fa'asalalauga muamua mai Amazon poʻo Flipkart ma o latou e ola i le miniti — le toe tusi e aofia.
seller_import.source_amazon_blurb: Tu'u atu le .xlsx/.xlsm fa'asalalauga template e faʻaaoga mo Amazon India.
seller_import.source_flipkart_blurb: Tu'u atu le .xls fa'asalalauga faila na e toki tauina mai Flipkart.
seller_import.source_csv_blurb: O le faʻalava CSV e aofia ai sku, igoa, tau, ata. Matou te faia le mea toe.
seller_import.step1_sub: Tipi le faila na foai mai e lou maaketi. Matou te tanumia .xlsx, .xlsm, .xls ma .csv e le sili atu i 25 MB.
seller_import.couldnt_read: Natou te le mafai ona faitau lou kataloka
seller_import.couldnt_read_body: Taumafai loa i se faila eseese.
seller_import.couldnt_publish: Natou te le mafai ona lomiga le sisifo
seller_import.margin_help: Faʻaoga i luga o mea uma na maua e ufi ai le aofaiga ma le faʻatupulaia.
seller_import.ai_help: Faʻaliliuina le faʻamatalaga Hindi/Hinglish i le Igilisi ma suʻeina faʻahou le faʻamatalaga e maʻala i le saila talaʻaga e faʻatoilalo.
seller_import.step4_failed_one: {{n}} laina na faʻaamataga. Vaʻai i le paipa a le tausuʻa mo le faʻamatalaga.
seller_import.step4_failed_other: {{n}} laina na faʻaamataga. Vaʻai i le paipa a le tausuʻa mo le faʻamatalaga.

admin_users.reset_2fa_msg: O le tagata e mafaia ona soka tūmamao LEAI le lana app faʻaopoopoga i le soka mulimuli. Faia lena naʻo afai ua e faʻamaonia lo latou faʻailoga.

buyer_returns.title: Oʻu toe foʻi
buyer_returns.empty_title: Leai se toe foʻi talu ai
buyer_returns.empty_body: Oe i le 7 aso faʻatasi mai le momoli e fai ai se gaioiga toe foʻi. A maeʻa e te fai ai, o le a aliali mai iinei faʻatasi ai ma lona faʻamaonia faʻasologa.

buyer_points.expiring_soon: ⚠️ {{n}} pts e faʻaiʻu i le mulimuli 30 aso
buyer_points.rate_cap: 📦 E oʻo atu i le 50% o le palepale e mafai ona tupe faʻapitoa
buyer_points.empty_text: Leai se gaioiga talu ai. Faʻaulufale poʻo le tusi aloʻa e amataina le maua! ✨
buyer_compare.title: Faʻatusitusia ({{count}})
buyer_compare.empty_body: Toʻilalo "Faʻaopoopo i le faʻatusitusia" i soʻo se oloa e amataina se faʻatusitusia faʻamigo-i-faʻamigo (e oʻo atu i le 4 mea).
buyer_notifications.title: Mealologa
buyer_notifications.empty_body: Faʻaulufale faʻafoʻi, faʻalagolago ma le momelolaʻi alilo o le a aliali mai iinei.
buyer_notification_prefs.title: Fa'alatalata
buyer_notification_prefs.hero_sub: Filifili le mea e fa'aalia i lou bell. Fa'alatalata o loʻo iai e tumau le manatua — e fa'agaioia e ia togitogitia faʻafuture.
buyer_notification_prefs.info_critical: Fa'aalala fa'asao taua ma faʻafitauli fagogo o le a oo mai ia te oe i polokalama, e oo lava i le mea na tapeapeina iinei.
legal_hub.title: Legalese & Fa'atonuga
legal_hub.hero_title: Mea uma i le tasi le nofoaga
legal_hub.hero_sub: Tulaga na e ioe ane i le taimi na e saini ae, faʻapea le alu, toe mai, ma faʻataunuʻuga a le faʻamatalau.
legal_hub.couldnt_load: Na le mafai ona uta atu fa'atonuga
legal_hub.footer_line: Allsale Ltd · Faʻatoʻia i Niu Siilani
legal_page.couldnt_load_title: Na le mafai ona uta atu lena pesi
legal_page.couldnt_load_default: Na le mafai ona uta atu fa'atonuga
ambassadors_landing.title: Polokalama Amipasatore
ambassadors_landing.unavailable: Fa'asoa polokalama e leai. Taumafai faʻafou.
ambassadors_landing.hero_sub: Ia Amipasatore a Allsale. Faʻasoa lou pouivi, tupe ulu i fagogo uma — a {{pct}}% i le faʻatau.
ambassadors_landing.section_how_you_earn: Faʻapefea e te tupe (NZ · AU · US · UK · CA)
ambassadors_landing.tier_footnote: O ʻau aiga e maua {{pct}}% ifo pe a faʻaogaina lou pouivi.
ambassadors_landing.india_title: Fai mai palalau — tupe i luga
ambassadors_landing.india_p1: ₹{{bounty}} ulua i le palalau fou (ina ua {{trigger}} alu fagogo) faʻapea {{hot}}% o le tuʻutuʻu fa'akaa mo {{months}} masina (fa'atapuʻu ₹{{cap}}) ma {{tail}}% faʻamoemoe umaloalofa.
ambassadors_landing.india_p2: O Amipasatore o Inia e maua foʻi le pouivi paileni — fa'alavelave ai faʻatau o le diaspora i fafo MA palalau saini i Inia.
ambassadors_landing.feature_cookie_sub: O ʻau aiga e pea ona faʻaiʻu mo {{days}} aso
ambassadors_landing.join_footnote_prefix: Leai se tupe • Leai fa'ata'ita'i • Tapunatupu mai
buyer_checkout_status.paid_sub: O ʻau fagogo e faʻamaufaufauina ma alu mai Inia i au Niu Siilani faitotonu.
buyer_checkout_status.unpaid_sub: Na matou leai se faʻamaonia saofaiga. O au paepae e pea pea — taumafai faʻafou pe a e saʻo.
buyer_checkout_status.confirming_sub: Mautu faʻatali faʻatasi ma matou faʻamatalaina ʻau saofaiga i Stripe.
buyer_country.hero_sub: Oloa faʻatatau mai Inia, tuʻuina i soʻu lalolagi. Filifili o ʻau nuu e maua ai mea fa'atafi ma tu'utuʻu.
buyer_country.detected_label: Na matou iloa o e i
buyer_country.or_other_region: Poʻo le faʻatau mai se isi nofoaga
buyer_country.app_banner_sub: Vave saofaiga · Fa'atosiga fagogo · Fa'alavelave mataʻina
buyer_prohibited.title: Tuʻuina i Niu Siilani?
buyer_prohibited.hero_title: Fa'amatala pe e tuʻu ai Niu Siilani MPI
buyer_prohibited.hero_sub: Tusi le mea e te manao e si alu mai Inia. E ta'u atu ia te oe pe faʻaturutuʻu i Niu Siilani fa'asao oloa tulafale.
buyer_prohibited.placeholder: fa'ata'ita'i latou i fale laddu, sapasapaʻu pickles…
buyer_prohibited.common_title: FA'ASAUA MASANI A NIUS SIILANI MPI
buyer_prohibited.common_body: Meaʻai fale-utua · Oloa susu (ghee, susuʻi, keke, palagi) · Manogi (siʻi, moa, mamoe) · Fua malulu & vaega susunu · Lolo · Mel · Laʻau ola · Oneone
buyer_referrals_simple.title: Tala mai i uo
buyer_referrals_simple.hero_sub: Fa'asoa lau code i uo. Latou te maua +{{rewardee}} pts. E maua e oe +{{referrer}} pts pe a folau le latou muamua faufautua.
buyer_referrals_simple.empty: Leai ni tala mai i le taimi nei. Fa'asoa lau code e amata ai ona maua! ✨
buyer_saved_searches.title: Saved searches
buyer_saved_searches.empty_title: Leai ni searches na save i le taimi nei
buyer_saved_searches.empty_body: Fa'aoga filters i lalo o se kategori pusa ma tafi "Save this search" e toe faatumou i se tafi.
buyer_saved_searches.delete_msg: E mafai ona e save foi i se taimi.
ambassadors_join.title: Fa'aoga e auai
ambassadors_join.lead: Faamatala ia matou ni itiiti e uiga ia oe. Matou te fatuina lau code vave.
ambassadors_join.india_banner_text: E maua e oe le customer code (₹5% off + 5% commission) MA le seller-recruit code (₹5K bounty + 10% rev-share). Faatupu salelau i fafo ma sellers i le aiga.
ambassadors_join.disclaimer: E ala i lau auai e te fa'atau i le Ambassador Programme T&Cs. O codes ua tulaga'i ma tupu - pe a fatuina, e le fesuisuia.
ambassadors_join.welcome_set_password: Setuina le password mai Settings e toe toe mai ai i se isi polokalama.
ambassadors_join.welcome_done: O oe nei o le Allsale Ambassador.
ambassadors_join.fail_default: Le mafai ona fa'ailoaina. Taumafai foi.
admin_analytics.title: A/B Analytics
admin_analytics.empty_title: Leai se faʻasalalauga i le taimi nei
admin_analytics.empty_body_suffix: mai lou faʻalapotopotoga. E aliali mai le faʻamatalaga iinei i loʻo sefulu sekone.
admin_analytics.sig_small: ⚠️  Laʻau tele e itiiti rawa i le malamalama — faʻatali mo suiga faʻasalalauga.
admin_analytics.sig_thin: ⚠️  Suiga e toe itiiti. Faʻamoemoe mo ≥ 30 i luga o tagata na e manatu.
admin_analytics.sig_healthy: ✅  Laʻau tele e lelei. Fuafua le p-value i faʻapitoa mo se faiuga tupu.
admin_analytics.sig_gathering: ℹ️  Laʻau e faapea lelei ae faaauau pea. Faʻamatalau pea.
admin_analytics.recent_empty: Leai se mea tupu `ab.exposure` talu ai.
ambassadors_dashboard.title: Faʻatonu
ambassadors_dashboard.toast_code_copied_: {{code}} e maʻoti ona liua i luma.
ambassadors_dashboard.share_msg: Faʻaogaina lo'u kupone {{code}} i Allsale mo {{suffix}}! https://allsale.co.nz/?ref={{code}}
ambassadors_dashboard.post_submitted_bod: Matou te fiafia e fiaʻia e vave.
ambassadors_dashboard.withdraw_queued_bo: {{amount}} — e te mauʻa ai i totonu o nisi aso faʻamatalaga.
ambassadors_dashboard.withdraw_failed_ti: Le mafai ona toia le mauala
ambassadors_dashboard.code_subtitle_b2c: Kupone faʻatau · Faʻaitiiti 5% mo le faʻatau
ambassadors_dashboard.code_subtitle_b2b: Kupone faʻatautai · Tuʻuina atu ni faʻamatalaga Igilani
ambassadors_dashboard.share_suffix_b2b: Masina 3 Pro le saoloto a e faʻasoa ai e pei o se faʻatautai
ambassadors_dashboard.content_sub: Liua se tafaʻilafi tuʻuga a soʻo se ala e teuʻu i Allsale. Matou te manaʻo i {{n}}/masina e faʻamaloloina lau faʻatapuʻu.
ambassadors_dashboard.sales_empty: Leai se faʻatau i le taimi nei. Faʻasalalau lau kupone e amata ai faʻatau!
ambassadors_dashboard.sellers_empty: Leai se faʻatautai ua tuʻuina atu. Faʻasalalau lau kupone faʻamatalaga i nisi alii e te iloaina.
ambassadors_dashboard.profile_open_full: Tatala le editara o faamatalaga atoatoa →
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_banned: O lenei kaute e le aoga lava mo le Ambassador Programme.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_rejected: Talofa {{name}} — na matou su'esu'eina o au talosaga ae e le fetaui ma a matou faataitaiga faalaolao.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_no: E mafai ona toe talosaga i lenei taimi
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_on: E mafai ona toe talosaga i
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_title: O au talosaga o loʻo su'esu'eina
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_sub: Faafetai {{name}} — e masani lava ona su'esu'e talosaga i le 2 aso faatauva'a. O le a matou faasalalauga ia te oe pe a iai lau code.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_code_label: O au code (e le aoga tonu)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_pending: Faitau vave — payout rules, content requirements, code of conduct.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_accepte: O a matou team o le a su'esu'e o au talosaga i le 2 aso faatauva'a.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sub: Toe fanasalalauga le talosaga fa'amaoni atu ia {{email}}
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_rate_l: E fa'alumaina i le tasi fanasalalauga i le itula.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sent_b: Vaʻaia lou inbox (ma le spam folder, pe a mafai).
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_failed: E le mafai ona toe fanasalalauga
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_titl: O le a tupu le isi
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_3: O matou te su'esu'e (1-2 aso faatauva'a)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_4: E maua le faasalalauga & o au code o loʻo ola
seller_bulk_upload.title: Faʻaoina tele
seller_bulk_upload.hero_title: Faʻaoina poʻo faʻabagaina le tele o liʻu i le tasi taimi
seller_bulk_upload.hero_body: Aoga lelei mo katalogi tele. Teuga le template, tusi o au oloa i Excel / Google Sheets, ona faʻaoina i tua. O le a matou tiʻitiʻia gagana uma aʻo leʻi faʻasao.
seller_bulk_upload.step2_label: STEP 2 · FAʻAOIA LE IMAGES ZIP (MAFAI ONO LEAI)
seller_bulk_upload.editing_label: FAʻABAGAI LIʻU O LOʻO I AI?
seller_bulk_upload.tip_prefix: E ose le laina i le oloa e tasi. Tuuina
seller_bulk_upload.tip_middle: gaogao e fai le liʻu fou, poʻo tausia ina ia faʻabagai liʻu o loʻo i ai. Faʻaoga
seller_bulk_upload.tip_suffix: e vaevaega ai le size, lanu ma le image URLs.
seller_bulk_upload.zip_subtitle: Toʻi igoa faila i lou sheet — o le a matou suia i URLs moni.
seller_bulk_upload.upload_hint: E oʻo i le 1000 laina · max 8 MB · faʻaoga le image URLs (o le a matou faleina automatikali).
seller_bulk_upload.file_failed_title: E le mafai ona faitau le faila
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_title: E leai se mea ia faʻaigoa
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_body: O gagana uma e sese. Talofa paiʻu ma tia toe fai.
seller_bulk_upload.download_failed_body: Na le mafai ona iloina le faila.
seller_bulk_upload.success_body: {{c}} na faia · {{u}} na faafouga · {{s}} na taʻua
